desc: Opens the Sheet & View Setup window — a WebView2 + AI Chat split-panel for managing sheets, views, scope boxes, templates, and titleblocks in the active Revit document.
summary: Opens the Sheet & View Setup window — a WebView2 + AI Chat split-panel for managing sheets, views, scope boxes, templates, and titleblocks in the active Revit document.

successprompts: Sheet & View Setup window is now open.
failureprompts: Failed to open Sheet & View Setup: {error}
